use_cases: Displaying user achievements and badges in profile pages
Showing competition winners with styled certificate variants
Gamification reward systems with level-based tiers (bronze, silver, gold, platinum)
Educational course completion certificates and badges
ai_summary: A versatile multi-variant awards component featuring 6 distinct styles (stamp, award, certificate, badge, sticker, id-card) with 4 achievement levels using gradient color schemes. Supports custom titles, recipients, dates, and icons for gamification systems, leaderboards, and achievement displays in educational or SaaS platforms.
